project.title: For the Promise
project.premise: Johanna's Promise answers the Archwarden's summons to Glintgate and is pulled into three converging dangers: the Council's poisoned escort contract into the deep forests of Vel'Era, Damien's political machinery, and the Order's hidden infrastructure in the city.
project.note: Planning documents generated retroactively from the author's Book 2 roadmap (planning/source-roadmap.md), not via the questionnaire. Documents contain [PROPOSED] and [TBD] markers requiring author input; see CLAUDE.md Open Questions.
